uplink.description: Status report, shock detected (motion true), normal battery and temperature
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame; wire fields parsed per upstream reference/upstream-codec.js (bytes[4]=120 -> 12.0 V, bytes[5..6]=0x0708 -> 18.00 C, bytes[7]=0 -> no temp alarms, bytes[8]=1 -> shock/motion). expected.data authored to the normalized vocabulary.
Synthetic in-bounds frame; bytes[8]=0 -> no shock, action.motion.detected false. Mirrors the motion-true vector with the shock byte cleared.

uplink.description: Status report, low battery, negative temperature, both temperature threshold alarms set
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame; bytes[4]=200 has high bit set -> lowBattery extra, (200&0x7f)/10=7.2 V; bytes[5..6]=0xFF9C two's-complement -> -1.00 C; bytes[7]=3 -> low+high temp alarm extras; bytes[8]=0 -> motion false. Parsed per reference/upstream-codec.js.

uplink.description: Device info / startup frame carries no measurement
uplink._note: Synthetic frame; bytes[3]=0 is the device-info/startup discriminator (sw/hw version + datecode in upstream), no normalized measurement.
Synthetic frame; fPort 23 is the upstream config-command channel, not a data report.
